' Byggstyrning Graphisoft IFC import journal  (OPTIONAL / DIAGNOSTIC ONLY)
'
' Default pipeline uses BatchRvt + graphisoft_import_rbp.py so the add-in loads
' reliably.  Keep this template for manual journal experiments or troubleshooting.
'
' Generated by Run-ByggPipelineSetup.ps1 -- do not edit manually.
'
' This journal invokes the ByggstyrningIFCImporter add-in which replicates the
' ArchiCAD "Improved IFC Import" (Graphisoft.IFCImporter) pipeline:
'   1. Revit API OpenIFCDocument()
'   2. RevitConnectionManaged.CorrectIFCImport() for geometry correction
'   3. View correction (phases, filters, 3D view)
'   4. SaveAs to output path
'
' The add-in reads configuration from environment variables set by PowerShell:
'   NOBEL_IFC_PATH        -- source IFC file
'   NOBEL_OUTPUT_PATH     -- destination RVT file
'   NOBEL_RESULT_PATH     -- JSON result sidecar
'   NOBEL_LOG_PATH        -- diagnostic log
'   NOBEL_AUTO_JOIN       -- 0/1 (default: 0)
'   NOBEL_CORRECT_OFF_AXIS -- 0/1 (default: 0)
'   NOBEL_IMPORT_ALL_PARAMS -- 0/1 (default: 1)
'
' Placeholders replaced at runtime:
'   {{REVIT_VERSION}}     e.g. 2025.000

Dim Jrn
Set Jrn = CrsJournalScript

' --- Startup directives (must match Revit version) -----------------------
Jrn.Directive  _
        "CategoryDisciplineFilter"  , 63
Jrn.Directive  _
        "DisciplineOption"  , 32253
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "StayOnModifyInProject" , 0
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "StayOnModifyInFamily" , 1
Jrn.Directive  _
        "TabDisplayOptions"  , "ActiveCtOnSelection" , 1
Jrn.Data  _
        "JournalDefaultTemplate"  , "Metric Multi-discipline=$AllUsersAppData\Templates\English\Default-Multi-Discipline_Metric.rte"
Jrn.Data  _
        "JournalDefaultViewDiscipline"  , "Coordination"
Jrn.Directive  _
        "Version"  , "{{REVIT_VERSION}}" , "2.179"

' --- Create new empty Metric project (needed for Add-Ins ribbon) ---------
  Jrn.Command "Ribbon"  , "Create a new project , ID_FILE_NEW_CHOOSE_TEMPLATE"
    Jrn.ComboBox "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "Control_Revit_TemplateCombo"  _
              , "SelEndOk"  , "<None>"
    Jrn.ComboBox "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "Control_Revit_TemplateCombo"  _
              , "Select"  , "<None>"
    Jrn.PushButton "Modal , New Project , Dialog_Revit_NewProject"  _
              , "OK, IDOK"
    Jrn.Data  _
            "TaskDialogResult"  , "Which system of measurement do you want to use in your project?" ,  _
             "Metric"  _
            , "1002"

' --- Synchronization: project creation transaction must complete ----------
  Jrn.Data  _
          "Transaction Successful"  , "Create Type Previews"

' --- Invoke ByggstyrningIFCImporter add-in via ribbon button --------------------
' The ImporterApp registers a push button under Add-Ins > Byggstyrning IFC panel.
' The ribbon event ID uses the PushButtonData internal name (not display text):
'   CustomCtrl_%CustomCtrl_%Add-Ins%<PanelName>%<InternalButtonId>:<FullClassName>
  Jrn.RibbonEvent "Execute external command:CustomCtrl_%CustomCtrl_%Add-Ins%Byggstyrning-IFC-Importer%ByggstyrningImportIFC:Byggstyrning.IFCImporter.ImportCommand"

' --- Exit Revit (discard the empty host project) -------------------------
  Jrn.Command "Internal"  , "Quit the application; prompts to save projects , ID_APP_EXIT"
